title: ITALY enforcement action against Sole Trader (1,000)
summary: Insufficient fulfilment of information obligations The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 1,000 on a sole trader. The controller used a video surveillance system, but did not indicate it with the necessary signage. Legal basis: Art. 5 (1) a) GDPR, Art. 13 GDPR.
dedupKey: italy enforcement action against sole trader 1 000|2026-02-12
